query: INSERT INTO workflow_coalesce (workflow_id, scope_key, event_ids, depth, fire_at) VALUES ($1, $2, ARRAY[$3]::uuid[], $4, now() + ($5::int * interval '1 second')) ON CONFLICT (workflow_id, scope_key) DO UPDATE SET event_ids = array_append(workflow_coalesce.event_ids, $3), depth = GREATEST(workflow_coalesce.depth, $4)
